modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty applying picture style to images in Word.

full_description_text: The user is trying to add a style to an image in Word but is unsure how to do it. They are confused about the steps needed to apply the style correctly. This issue is causing frustration during their work.
short_description: Difficulty applying picture style to images in Word.
description: The user is trying to add a style to an image in Word but is unsure how to do it. They are confused about the steps needed to apply the style correctly. This issue is causing frustration during their work.
